appendix.title: Global Configuration Files
appendix.para: This section describe each of the global configuration parameter used in SilkPage. This information is most useful when configuring SilkPage globally after the installation.

section.para: It is a catalog of public resources such as DTDs or entities that are referenced in an XML document. It's typically used to make web references to resources point to a locally cached copy of the resource. SilkPage uses this catalog to perform Entity and URI resolution. Please refer to the for more information about the usage and syntax of catalog.xml.

The token.properties is located in the directory and it's used for replacing the occurrence of a given string with another. token.properties may contain a set of key and value entries. Each antry should be defined in a separate line.

SilkPage uses Tidy to validate and cleanup the XHTML output. tidy.properties is located in the directory and it is the Tidy confiuration file to control its parameters. To find out about the Tidy parameters and options that can be defined in tidy.properties, please refere to Website.
